hero.title: Stop forgetting.
hero.desc: The SM-2 algorithm schedules your reviews — the same method used by polyglots and doctors. You flip the cards. The rest works on its own.
hero.imgAlt: Memlo study session view — flashcard with answer and rating buttons

steps.title: Four steps to effective learning
steps.createSetDesc: Group your material by topic — a separate set for each subject, language, or chapter.
steps.addCardsDesc: Create them manually or paste text and let AI generate questions.
steps.studyDesc: Flip cards, rate your knowledge. The Pomodoro timer helps you stay focused.
steps.rememberDesc: The SM-2 algorithm decides when to revisit a question. The same method used by polyglots learning 6+ languages.

demo.label: What does studying look like?
demo.title: Flip the card, rate yourself, move on
demo.subtitle: The SM-2 algorithm handles the rest. It decides when to revisit each question — so you don’t forget.
demo.question: Question
demo.questionText: Which protocol is responsible for reliable packet delivery in the TCP/IP model?
demo.answerText: TCP (Transmission Control Protocol) — provides flow control, retransmission, and segment ordering.

features.label: What you get
features.title: Methods backed by research
features.primaryDesc: Ebbinghaus proved that after 24 hours you remember only 30% of the material. The SM-2 algorithm — used by doctors, translators, and researchers — schedules reviews at increasing intervals. You review exactly when you’re about to forget.
features.pomodoroDesc: 25 minutes of study, 5 minutes of break. Zero distractions — just you and the material.
features.recallDesc: You don’t read notes. You recall. Research shows it works 3x better.
features.customDesc: Edit, create from scratch, delete. Or paste text and let AI help.
features.setsDesc: English, biology, driving test — each set is a separate knowledge pack.
features.cloudDesc: Laptop, phone, tablet. Your flashcards are waiting in the cloud.

cta.title: Your memory needs a system, not more hours
cta.desc: Join for free. No credit card, no set limits.
